THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, CELSO GONGORA S/A SANCHES GONGORA, MARIO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 545 O'FARRELL STREET #205, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUL-23-1996, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFTS VACATE TIMELY, PLTF WILL RETURN $600 SECURITY DEPOS WHEN KEYS ARE RETURNED. DEPOSIT TO BE RETAINED BY PLTF IF DEFTS DO NOT VACATE. PLTF WAIVES DAILY DAMAGES. EACH SIDE TO BEAR OWN ATNYS FEES & COSTS; MUTUTAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS.
